segments.text: Now for example, this morning I was discussing that people take, fill the wash basin and
wash their face in west.
In India we cannot conceive of it – you can not even think off-it!
People don't know how to do because traditional way has come out if your washing
your face and again the water goes into there, then all that dirt is in it.
Again you are using same water so we cannot have complete.
So always use running water traditionally we've learnt to do
It's s much our heads in our discretion
That can not even think of such a thing
Simple things that Muladhara must be cleaned and washed
Any Indian will take he knows because they must have had some problems before
Whether He is in the North, is it South East or West ask Him.

but if you have a traditions say

by discarding them they will understand it's wrong
so more traditional you are and ancient you learn many things
Like we have to say English are very traditional
So supposing there a lady coming down
And your'e come into the lady

He'll just move, but if she's going up then man will follow her.
Just happens automatically because traditionally they have learned that
If you are going down the lady may fall or something so we should be in front

and these habit are built better with trial-and error methods
And thats how it developed

out.

all acts of that even say stalking to other person

person.
Like if you said very harsh, then he should know how neutralize it so that he retains
into himself all these descriptions only come also by tradition when we find something
that is futile in a collective way, in the tradition drops off.

but greater all the blessing's
have your spirit and the blessing from the Spirit
as such through your vibrations
immediately you know this wrong

And just give up
You want ascend

so for whatever needed will do
Today we have assembled here to do the puja of Vishnumaya.
Vishnumaya is created through human effort also
as you see, the clouds when they rub against each other
then their electricity gets created
so first the cloud has been created
The sun acts on this sea
See how many chakras come into play
Sea is the void and sun acts on sea, also moon acts in the sea.
As a result of that clouds are created
This electricity
Is not created
In ocean
That would create problems
It's created into sky
So everybody can see it
Can hear
They sees first
And hears later
It's all well-organized, well calculated – that is Vishnuvayi.
But it was created also with some understanding by human beings on this earth.
First of all we saw the two clouds rubbing each other so in primitive stage humans tried
to rub 2 material things together.
So two material things, that is 2 parts of matter when rubbed created the electricity.
It's very significant to see. Matter can be used
To create electricity
The spark or the electricity comes from a matter
Without matter they could not have started cooking food
So how it has helped, devoid.
First from the ocean – It went into sky gave a message to people
To create electricity and see their love
Then they learned how cook food for digestion
To be easier of human beings
How is comes back?
From nature
how human beings learn and do it for the good, betterment, heat of human-beings.
This benevolent energy which was meant
by the benevolence from humans again was utilized
as you see this is a creation all these are of Vishnumaya
that's why its Maya with electricity
You can create a Maya
You know that very well how you can create it.

spontaneous way so many who
dealing with this electricity
In creating Maya
America is
much helped by
This electricity

create electricity.

into her stomach and must burning stones inside here to make the coal.
And then that coal is used for making electricity!
How much nature works on our betterment?
Your New York would not have been there but for electricity it stopped for fifteen

For your destruction

again some religion but that is within us absolutely

this country

has given ideas for everyone

She's a sister of Shri Krishna

she came down to help You

now of course everything so confused
but that' sthe purest relationships between
brother and sisters

A brother who doesn't feel hurt
if

only Her chastity can protect him – it´s a mutual working
This feeling if does not develop
That she' s My Sister
and I have look after Her Chastity
For that I have to behave myself well, so that she doesn't find faults with Me.
It's such a cleansing process this relationship has
as much the electricity and the cleansing processes for you

for her brother
She cooks him
tells them right path

know the same was born again at
time of Shri Krishna as Draupadi she took
her birth as Draupadi

That this should cover its part of their body
In these maya nagris the other way round

that in our culture women must expose their body.

The brothers who do not bother about the chastity
of husband or sister and also support him
and asking to do wrong things, hide his thing are also equally responsible.
Like in Sahaja Yoga you know that a sister is to be protected
And the sisters husband if he's doing anything wrong
He has been told off by them
like once
In India one newspaper passed some remarks about me
My brothers were up in arms. I thought now it's going to be terrible, how am I gonna manage it?
It was a big problem! They where are they're gointo the courts
when i told them that will not get into court or don't go but we'll do
and then my husband also
And me and my brother put together was formidable
I didn' know what tp do
So I wrote one Sahaja yogi who would see the editor of newspaper
tell him these people is my brothers, be careful
They are very powerful people in India and from here my husband is terrible, but they
would not apologize.
So I thought of another Vishnumaya that there was a big strike – the paper was
closed for exactly six months!
And then had to go into it with great losses…
And when they started, the people who were working there came back and said that
why did you write against Shri Mataji?
We are not going to come back.
They had to apologize!
So how
The brother's love can compel even Adi Shakti
To do things she would normally don't
In a same way when Draupadi was challenged
Sri Krishna was
Not in Hastinapur where it had happened
He was thousand, at least more than a thousand miles away from that place but said that Shankh

he came on his condor with all His weapons – Shankh Chakra Gada Padma All these

He was a great brother to the Statue of Liberty

Without charging them anything
To punish husbands who were drunkards

apart from his wife was the sister who helped him
to type for Him

Of her sister
The way she had problem
This relationship is so pure
Which doesn't want anything

May in England or possibly America they says so
but her sister cannot divorce? She can not divorce it!
This time the newspaper published name of my brother
So what could i do he's is My Brother
Good bad anything
He Is My Brother I Can Not Divorce Him

Nature has given you this relationship.

in these relationships
if We do not respect such a relation
it cannot work out collectively
like

funny happening
somebody's wife

one that makes you understand and feel
beauty, power of sisterly-brothery relationship.

cannot say in one room

who can't stay

what poetic things
